raw_consumer_statement:
citi bank, I attempted to use my citiXXXX XXXX XXXX to make a down payment on installation of new cabinets XXXX. Payment did not went through and was canceled per Marchant. A few weeks later I noticed that the payment did went through, I contacted the merchant, he did not responded at that time. I have filed a Duplicate payment dispute with CiTi bank. I have submitted the contract and evidence that full payment was made by other means XXXX and XXXX XXXX Citibank refunded the {$4500.00} but later reverse the Refund stating that payment was justified. I texted the merchant Stating I would involve the police if he did not return the duplicate payment. The merchant text back stating that he does not have the money was returned and send a copy of his bank statement Proving the money was returned to CiTi bank. I do not understand why CiTi bank reverse the duplicate payment transaction refund although I have submitted the contract, clear evidence that the contract has been fulfilled by other means, text messages from the merchant stating that this was a duplicate payment, Including bank statement from the merchant where the transaction was reversed. 

Please investigate ; Case ID number ; XXXX
